creator: djr@pdconsec.net
text:
Is it possible that this bug and bug 153496 
(http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=amd64/153496) are related in some 
way? FreeBSD on Hyper-V R2 worked fine with 8.0-RELEASE through 
8.0-RELEASE-p5, so there appears to have been a breaking change between the 
8.0 and 8.1 releases.

As per 153496, I have an environment available for debugging or execution of 
test/debug cases if someone can tell me what needs to be done (e.g. point me 
at the documentation).

-- 
David Rawling
PD Consulting And Security
